overall.description: Cinematic game footage depicting a hooded character riding a white horse along railroad tracks through a stormy mountain landscape at night. The journey progresses from an elevated stone bridge across a valley into open grasslands and finally alongside rocky cliffs, featuring a brief supernatural blue energy flash in the forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated railway bridge with stone parapets

agents.ego_description: riding a white horse at steady canter along elevated railroad bridge with stone walls on both sides

entered.detail: metal railway tracks with wooden ties running through the center of the bridge
tall stone parapet wall running along the left side of the bridge
tall stone parapet wall running along the right side of the bridge
large pine tree silhouetted against the stormy sky at the end of the bridge
dark mountain peaks visible in the distant background under storm clouds
dense forest of pine trees visible on the left hillside in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, stormy night with the camera following a rider on a white horse across an elevated railway bridge. Stone walls flank both sides of the wooden track bed, while a tall pine tree looms ahead against the mountainous backdrop.

events.description: bright blue supernatural light flashes briefly among the trees on the left side
horse moves from wooden bridge planks onto dirt ground beside the tracks

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride the horse, transitioning from the confined bridge to open terrain and passing the tall pine tree

entered.detail: dirt and grass ground surface beside the railway tracks
wooden post fence running parallel to the tracks on the left side
open grassland replacing the stone walls of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The horse leaves the bridge and descends to open ground beside the tracks. A sudden blue energy flash illuminates the trees to the left. The environment opens into grassy terrain with a wooden fence visible, while the stone bridge walls disappear behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with rocky cliff face

events.description: large rocky cliff face becomes prominent on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: riding alongside the railway with a rocky cliff wall passing by closely on the right

entered.detail: large gray rock wall rising steeply on the right side of the tracks

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as a massive rocky cliff face rises on the right, creating a more enclosed feeling. The wooden fence and trees are left behind as the horse continues along the dirt trail beside the tracks, with the cliff wall dominating the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy mountain landscape that shifts from an elevated bridge to an open plain and finally into a narrow cliffside pass. It begins by trailing a rider on a white horse across a wooden railway bridge flanked by stone walls, with a tall pine tree looming against the dark, mountainous backdrop. As the horse descends from the bridge to open ground, a sudden flash of blue energy illuminates the surrounding trees while the environment expands into a grassy terrain marked by a wooden fence. The scene then shifts as the path narrows, leaving the fence and trees behind while a massive rocky cliff face rises on the right to dominate the frame. The camera continues its forward motion along the dirt trail beside the tracks, moving from the openness of the plains into the enclosed shadow of the towering stone wall.
